name: tn170-attendance
//: build:pages = GitHub Pages frontend; deploy:spark = Firestore rules/indexes only (not hosting)

scripts.deploy:hosting: node -e "console.error('App is hosted on GitHub Pages, not Firebase Hosting. Run: npm run build:pages, then commit and push root assets.'); process.exit(1)"
scripts.deploy:functions: node -e "console.error('Cloud Functions require Firebase Blaze billing. TN-170 is Spark-only, so this deploy is blocked.'); process.exit(1)"
